thesis_usage: Network/control-volume model over branches and components, not a full 3D CFD mesh.
OpenFOAM high-fidelity reference evidence used as target/context according to split role.
Thesis shorthand for the coupled reduced fluid/wall modeling workflow.
M0-M6 are thesis endpoint forms from setup-only baseline through final frozen candidate.
MF-01 to MF-06 are literature-derived or architecture-derived model families.
Gate for publishing final predictive scores after exactly one runtime-legal candidate is frozen.
Gate that checks a candidate's source validity, property sensitivity, and split legality before freeze.
Thermal candidate lane connected to source-side/upcomer evidence and residual ownership.
Study family for the recirculating upcomer exchange-cell model and sampled/Qwall evidence.
Pressure branch-use and F6 candidate gate for ordinary-flow or low-recirculation anchors.
Follow-on gate after a candidate passes S11-like checks; not currently triggered.
Pressure reduction using paired upstream/downstream endpoints over a section or feature.
Sensor target class for fluid/probe temperatures. In error tables, units are Kelvin.
Sensor target class for wall temperatures. In error tables, units are Kelvin.

expanded_meaning: Kelvin or loss coefficient depending context
thesis_usage: `error_K` means Kelvin temperature error; `K_eff`/`component_K` are dimensionless pressure-loss coefficients.
Aggregate error magnitude; useful but insufficient without signed individual sensor errors.
Positive means over-prediction; negative means under-prediction.
Signed error normalized by target absolute temperature in Kelvin for figure-ready sensor rows.
Named output or target used for scoring/gating, such as pressure residual or TP/TW temperature.
Same-QOI mesh/time/neighbor-window uncertainty evidence required before admission.
A bounded model or CFD-derived region used for conservation ledgers.
Usually kg/s; forbidden as a realized CFD runtime input for predictive claims unless setup-facing/admitted.
Heat-transfer coefficient correlation output; not allowed to absorb residuals from sources/walls/junctions.
Hydraulic friction closure; ordinary single-stream use is blocked in recirculating states.
Pressure/friction candidate lane requiring endpoint fields, ordinary-flow checks, and same-QOI UQ.
Reference pressure comparison family used in F3-vs-F6 discussions.
Only valid after component isolation, pressure/velocity basis, recovery, and UQ gates pass.
Use when the extraction domain is a section rather than an isolated component.
Use for close-coupled fittings/features that cannot be separated into a single component.

expanded_meaning: integrated wall heat transfer in watts
thesis_usage: Trusted wall heat-flux integral; currently not released for S13 production admission.
Realized CFD output; diagnostic unless converted into a permitted target/evidence lane.
S13 source-side label: Q_source_static_bc_W minus Q_sink_static_bc_W; not the same as Q_wall_W.
Fraction of a section/interface area with reverse-flow behavior.
Fraction of mass flow participating in reverse-flow behavior.
Mesh-convergence uncertainty concept; only valid for specific admitted QOI rows.
Author/title/equation/range provenance that bounds a closure's use.
Rows allowed for fitting only when candidate/source/property gates allow it.
Rows that support sensitivity/trend reasoning but are not fit rows.
Rows used only after freeze; no fitting/model selection.
Blind-style score/context rows; never used for fitting/model selection.
The reduced-order model code path, distinct from OpenFOAM CFD.
Native CFD outputs are read-only unless a task explicitly claims derived extraction.
The experimental/CFD loop context for the thesis work.
